name: low_complexity
description: Homopolymer runs (AAAA..., TTTT...), simple di/tri-nucleotide microsatellites with no clean tandem period, and AT-rich heterochromatic stretches such as the long heterochromatic block of chrY (Yq12) and pericentromeric AT islands. Shannon 5-mer entropy is depressed because only a handful of 5-mers dominate the window. Mapping is inherently ambiguous; anchor density is reduced and chains in such regions need a wider multi-position search.
